title: Incorrect optimization of IN operator.
poc: CREATE TABLE t1(x INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, y);
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX t1y ON t1(y);
SELECT t1.x FROM t2 CROSS JOIN t1 WHERE t2.z = t1.y AND t1.x IN (111, 222);
SELECT t1.x FROM t2 CROSS JOIN t1 WHERE t2.z = t1.y AND +t1.x IN (111, 222);
key_bug_features: Incorrect optimization of IN operator in queries
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(x INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, y TEXT NOT NULL);
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX idx_t1_y ON t1(y);
SELECT t1.x FROM t2 JOIN t1 ON t2.z = t1.y WHERE t1.x IN (1, 2, 3);
SELECT t1.x FROM t2 JOIN t1 ON t2.z = t1.y WHERE +t1.x IN (1, 2, 3);
